title: urochloa helopus
intro: Urochloa helopus, also known as elephant grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Urochloa helopus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Urochloa helopus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
